approved.reason: Yardeni source windows are native S&P 500 windows and yfinance ^GSPC is the same index target; projection is calendar-date membership to non-native timeframes.
NBER contraction months are accepted only as macro Crisis context for S&P 500 bars, not as trade-entry evidence.
SPY and ES=F are S&P 500 tradable proxy targets; source-window membership can attach as context labels with provenance.
NBER contraction months can attach as macro Crisis context to S&P 500 tradable proxy targets with explicit provenance.

blocked_or_rejected.reason: No dated Sideways source window or approved adjudication protocol exists.
QQQ, NQ, Dow instruments, and similar targets are not exact S&P 500 same-underlying/proxy labels under this decision.
S&P 500 and NBER source windows are not direct labels for commodities, volatility, or crypto targets.

remaining_blockers: Sideways still has zero dated source-window slots under this lane.
Nasdaq, Dow, commodity, volatility, crypto, Kraken, and broader provider/timeframe cells remain unapproved unless separate exact sources or explicit crosswalks are supplied.
Source-label slot attachment is not the same as calibrated 95% held-out confidence; downstream calibration remains required before completion.
